inputs.label: Initial Component Weight
inputs.businessContext: Original weight of the component before optimization. Based on typical automotive/aerospace parts.

inputs.label: Weight Reduction Percentage
inputs.businessContext: Expected weight reduction from topology optimization. Typical range 10-50% per industry benchmarks.

inputs.label: Annual Distance Traveled
inputs.businessContext: Total distance the vehicle travels per year. Used to calculate fuel savings.

inputs.label: Fuel Consumption
inputs.businessContext: Vehicle fuel consumption rate. Standard measure for fuel efficiency.

inputs.label: Fuel Price
inputs.businessContext: Current fuel price per liter. Varies by region.

inputs.label: Optimization Cost
inputs.businessContext: One-time cost for topology optimization (engineering, software, testing).

inputs.label: Annual Production Volume
inputs.businessContext: Number of components produced per year. Affects per-unit cost savings.

inputs.label: Material Cost per kg
inputs.businessContext: Cost of material per kilogram. Used to calculate material savings.

inputs.label: Vehicle Lifespan
inputs.businessContext: Expected lifespan of the vehicle. Used for total savings over lifetime.

inputs.label: Discount Rate
inputs.businessContext: Discount rate for NPV calculation. Typical range 3-10%.

thresholds.weightReductionPercent > 50: High weight reduction may require advanced materials or compromise structural integrity.
thresholds.fuelConsumption > 15: High fuel consumption indicates inefficient vehicle; savings may be overestimated.
thresholds.optimizationCost > 100000: Optimization cost is high; consider alternative methods.

hiddenLossDrivers: weightReductionPercent > 50 ? 'High weight reduction may require advanced materials or compromise structural integrity.' : ''
fuelConsumption > 15 ? 'High fuel consumption indicates inefficient vehicle; savings may be overestimated.' : ''
optimizationCost > 100000 ? 'Optimization cost is high; consider alternative methods.' : ''
suggestedActions: If paybackPeriod > 3 years, consider reducing optimization cost or increasing production volume.
If roi < 10%, re-evaluate weight reduction targets or material costs.
Consider using lighter materials if weight reduction exceeds 50%.
